# OrbitBoard - Project Management for Indian Startups

OrbitBoard is a high-velocity project management platform designed specifically for founders and fast-moving teams.

## Key Features
- Workspace isolation for multiple projects/teams
- Real-time Kanban boards and Sprint planning
- AI-powered command parser for natural language task creation
- India-first billing and GST support
- Built for speed and zero-friction workflows

## Navigation
- [Home](https://orbitboard.in/) - Main marketing page
- [Features](https://orbitboard.in/features) - Detailed product capabilities
- [Pricing](https://orbitboard.in/pricing) - Transparent plans from Free to Enterprise
- [Contact](https://orbitboard.in/contact) - Get in touch with our team
- [Upcoming Features](https://orbitboard.in/upcoming-features) - Product roadmap

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React (Vite), Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Supabase (Auth, Database, Edge Functions, Real-time)
- Infrastructure: Vercel / Cloudflare
